SourceProxy.name: UDPPing
SourceProxy.label: UDP Ping

Documentation.short_help: Send a small packet at each pipeline update.

SourceProxy.Documentation: Send a small packet with number of points at each pipeline update. Can be used to know if the pipeline is still alive.

IntVectorProperty.name: MinimalDelay
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Minimal delay between two consecutive ping in milliseconds. Default to 1000ms.
